Exhaust air volumes, MUA sizing, air exchanger sizing, pressure strategy (positive/neutral/zoned). Effort included within ITM-004.
Heating unit(s), MUA, air exchanger, exhaust fans (repair bays, welding, service pit), 6 ceiling fans, wash bay equipment. Effort included within ITM-004.
Gas tie-in (PKG-018), structural supports (PKG-002), electrical power (PKG-004), plumbing/utility room (PKG-006), crane clearance (PKG-002/crane). Effort included within ITM-001 and ITM-004.
Facilitate County review, attend meetings, respond to comments. Effort included within ITM-001 and ITM-004.
Internal discipline review against Alberta Building Code and Safety Codes. Effort included within ITM-004.
